name: Create a Layby
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure layby functionality in Retail Express to offer customers flexible payment options that help increase sales opportunities, particularly for higher-value purchases where customers prefer to pay over time. This capability enables your retail operators to manage deposit-based sales efficiently, which helps secure revenue while accommodating customer payment preferences."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up proper layby workflows enables your retail operations to track partial payments and product allocations accurately, helping optimize inventory management while providing customer-friendly payment flexibility. This helps retail businesses expand their customer base by offering accessible purchase options while maintaining proper financial controls and inventory visibility."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Laybys allow the customer to reserve products but pay the full total of the sale at a later date e.g. Christmas laybys."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When a Layby transaction is processed the inventory is updated to:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reduce ", "italic": true}, {"text": "the Available Stock"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Increase ", "italic": true}, {"text": "the Allocated stock (to show it has been allocated to a sale, but not yet removed from the store, and still included as stock on hand)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "It's possible to process both Layby and Cash & Carry sales in the same transaction by changing the Fulfilment Method for individual products on the Products tab (see below for details)"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Video Overview"}], "data-id": "video-overview"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Find more information on how to add payments in the POS - Make Additional Layby Payments article."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Create a Layby"}], "data-id": "create-a-layby"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a layby or layaway transaction:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a sale in POS"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " to the sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Pencil", "bold": true}, {"text": " icon"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You can specify the Minimum Deposit amount within the POS Order Settings"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Minimum Amount Due", "bold": true}, {"text": " appears at the top of the Payment Tab, calculated based on the products with a Fulfilment Method of Layby (configured on the Products tab)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000poUv6EAE.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000poUv6EAE.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage (11).jpeg"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Finalise the Order, and provide a copy of the Receipt or Invoice to the customer"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
